_note: Single source of truth for ALL ShibKart art. Generators compose: subject + style_anchor + quality[category], and use negative_base + negative[category]. Edit-pipeline assets ignore negatives (distilled cfg=1) — their lever is subject+silhouette+denoise. Logos use Qwen + ShibLogo LoRA (text2img) where negatives/steps/sampler apply.
style_anchor: ShibKart house style: adorable chibi Shiba Inu kart-racing brand, bold clean vector-cartoon shading with thick dark-brown outlines, saturated warm palette anchored on shiba-orange #f8a13c, cyan #34e0ff, violet #7b4dff and cream #ffe9c9, soft bright studio lighting, glossy Nintendo Mario-Kart-8 production polish, cohesive on-brand
negative_base: watermark, signature, ugly, blurry, low-res, lowres, jpeg artifacts, noise, muddy desaturated colors, photorealistic, gritty, grimy, harsh shadows, deformed, extra limbs, cluttered, messy, amateurish

quality.logo: crisp centered mascot emblem, sticker style, clean thick outline, transparent background, high detail, vector-clean
quality.hero: cinematic wide 16:9 establishing shot, dynamic sense of speed, depth and parallax, warm rim light, vibrant
quality.icon: single flat game icon, centered, bold readable silhouette, thick outline, transparent background
quality.tile: seamless tileable PBR albedo, flat orthographic top-down, even flat lighting, uniform, no perspective, no border
quality.sponsor: flat front-facing race billboard poster, bold graphic composition, filling the frame
quality.livery: flat kart decal sheet, bold graphic, transparent background
quality.panel: clean rounded game UI panel skin, glossy, subtle bevel

negative.logo: text, words, letters, typography, gibberish text, misspelled, cropped, off-center, background scenery
negative.icon: text, background, scenery, multiple objects, drop shadow
negative.tile: character, shiba, dog, kart, vehicle, mascot, person, scene, isometric, 3d perspective, horizon, sky, sign, logo, border, frame, vignette, watermark

logos.model: standard silhouette-edit pipeline (NO LoRA) — a mascot emblem, not a text wordmark
logos.note: Only ui/logo.png uses this. The menu shows a crisp CSS text wordmark if logo.png is absent, so logos are OPTIONAL.

items.name: logo
items.subject: a ShibKart mascot emblem: a chibi shiba inu in a red racing helmet inside a bold rounded badge with crossed checkered flags, no text

items.name: logo_bone

items.name: logo_treat
items.subject: a ShibKart treat-edition mascot emblem: the chibi shiba with a golden dog-biscuit badge motif, no text

menu.name: hero_bg
menu.subject: a heroic ShibKart splash scene: three chibi shiba inu racers drifting their karts around a sunlit stylized circuit, sparks and speed lines, checkered banners, rolling hills and blue sky behind

menu.name: panel
menu.subject: a rounded glossy ShibKart menu panel skin, orange-to-violet gradient with a cream inner and a thin gold trim

menu.name: ic_garage

menu.name: ic_trophy

tiles_road.grass: worn dark grey race asphalt with faint cracks and tyre scuffs
tiles_road.cherry: clean light grey race asphalt with faint pink cherry petals scattered
tiles_road.city: dark wet neon-city street asphalt with subtle painted lane fragments
tiles_road.desert: sun-bleached cracked tan tarmac with light sand drift
tiles_road.moon: glowing sci-fi hex-panel track surface with cyan seams
tiles_road.snow: packed pale icy race road with compressed snow texture
tiles_road.volcano: charred cracked black volcanic race road with faint ember glow in the cracks
tiles_road.beach: warm wooden boardwalk race planks running lengthwise

tiles_ground.cherry: soft green grass dusted with pink cherry blossom petals
tiles_ground.city: dark concrete plaza pavement with subtle grid joints
tiles_ground.moon: grey lunar regolith with tiny craters
tiles_ground.volcano: dark cracked basalt rock with faint orange lava veins
tiles_ground.beach: golden sandy beach with tiny shells

tile_anchor: flat top-down seamless repeating ground surface texture, hand-painted stylized cartoon, bright and clean, texture only — no characters, no dogs, no karts, no vehicles, no people, no logos, no signs, no horizon, no perspective, fills the frame edge to edge
